name: Prozedurale Programmierung für Informatiker
content: Prozedurale Programmierung für Informatiker — TUHH Computer Science (B.Sc.) core module, 6 LP. Procedural programming: language constructs, data types, compilation, debugging, structured program design.

name: Functional Programming
content: Functional Programming — TUHH Computer Science (B.Sc.) core module, 6 LP. Functions, recursion, higher-order functions, types, immutability, evaluation.

name: Programmierparadigmen
content: Programmierparadigmen — TUHH Computer Science (B.Sc.) core module, 6 LP. Object-oriented, functional, logic and concurrent programming paradigms.

name: Algorithmen und Datenstrukturen
content: Algorithmen und Datenstrukturen — TUHH Computer Science (B.Sc.) core module, 6 LP. Sorting, searching, lists, trees, hashing, graphs, complexity analysis.

name: Diskrete Algebraische Strukturen
content: Diskrete Algebraische Strukturen — TUHH Computer Science (B.Sc.) core module, 6 LP. Number theory, rings, finite fields, combinatorics, proof techniques.

name: Automata Theory and Formal Languages
content: Automata Theory and Formal Languages — TUHH Computer Science (B.Sc.) core module, 6 LP. Finite automata, regular and context-free languages, grammars, pushdown automata.

name: Berechenbarkeit und Komplexität
content: Berechenbarkeit und Komplexität — TUHH Computer Science (B.Sc.) core module, 6 LP. Turing machines, decidability, reductions, P vs NP, NP-completeness.

name: Databases
content: Databases — TUHH Computer Science (B.Sc.) core module, 6 LP. Relational model, SQL, ER modelling, normalisation, transactions, indexing.

name: Software Engineering
content: Software Engineering — TUHH Computer Science (B.Sc.) core module, 6 LP. Requirements, design, testing, software processes, version control, quality.

name: Technische Informatik
content: Technische Informatik — TUHH Computer Science (B.Sc.) core module, 6 LP. Digital logic, number representation, processor architecture, memory, assembly.

name: Computer Networks and Internet Security
content: Computer Networks and Internet Security — TUHH Computer Science (B.Sc.) core module, 6 LP. Layered models, TCP/IP, routing, protocols, network security basics.

name: Stochastik
content: Stochastik — TUHH Computer Science (B.Sc.) core module, 6 LP. Probability, random variables, distributions, expectation, statistics fundamentals.

name: Graphentheorie und Optimierung
content: Graphentheorie und Optimierung — TUHH Computer Science (B.Sc.) core module, 6 LP. Graphs, trees, shortest paths, flows, matchings, linear/combinatorial optimisation.

name: Grundlagen der Betriebswirtschaftslehre
content: Grundlagen der Betriebswirtschaftslehre — TUHH Computer Science (B.Sc.) core module, 6 LP. Foundations of business administration for engineers.

name: Nichttechnische Angebote im Bachelor
content: Nichttechnische Angebote im Bachelor — TUHH Computer Science (B.Sc.) core module, 6 LP. Non-technical electives: self-management, teamwork, communication.

name: Mathematics I
content: Mathematics I — TUHH Computer Science (B.Sc.) core module, 8 LP. Linear algebra and analysis foundations: vectors, matrices, sequences, limits, differentiation.

name: Mathematics II
content: Mathematics II — TUHH Computer Science (B.Sc.) core module, 8 LP. Integration, series, multivariable calculus, differential equations.

name: Mathematics III
content: Mathematics III — TUHH Computer Science (B.Sc.) core module, 8 LP. Advanced topics: numerical methods, transforms, further linear algebra.

name: Software-Fachpraktikum
content: Software-Fachpraktikum — TUHH Computer Science (B.Sc.) core module, 6 LP. Team software project applying software-engineering practice.

name: Seminare Informatik
content: Seminare Informatik — TUHH Computer Science (B.Sc.) core module, 6 LP. Seminar: literature study, scientific writing and presentation in computer science.
